decision_boundary: adrs decides the common repo/package/core-port-adapter rules; governance implements the non-authority pure projection/check/explain/plan functions.

responsibilities: project accepted ADR bundle plus explicit repo snapshot into repo/package contracts
emit docs and migration plans as data
write stdout/stderr or requested output files

acceptance_gates: no governance records or generated cache reintroduced
package docs preserve adrs#13 pure projection boundary
CLI docs contain no rule semantics not present in lib docs
future code must prove repo-governance can lint itself and reject synthetic adapter-in-core fixture
non_goals: no full implementation in this proposal
verdict: mergeable as package-strategy proposal after adrs decision is accepted; implementation remains a later PR
